data.content: Implementation review approved. Both children handled: (1) b2b7 — implementation review passed, advanced to ready_for_shipment. All 4 requirements verified: rolling last-24h filter with preset precedence, buildCombinedSeries for all-steps aggregation, buildLeaderboard with margin calculations, existing date-range behavior preserved. (2) dafe — shipment review passed, shipped. 54 tests across 3 test files cover rolling filters, combined series, and leaderboard margins. All quality gates green: TypeScript clean, 2237/2237 tests pass, no lint issues in changed files.
